name: fey-glade
summary: A clearing in the Feywild where the rules of botany have been negotiated. Mushroom rings mark meeting-places, flowers bloom out of season, and a single tree presides like a monarch.

size_guidance.aspect_ratio: roughly circular or square — glades favor rounded perimeters

accent.purpose: ring of altered ground at the glade's heart

primary_palette.note: the glade centers on a thinking tree
a noble of the Summer or Winter court holds court here
scrying pool at the heart of the clearing

story_prompts: the court is in session — the archfey present, attendants arrayed in the ring
dawn, dew-heavy, empty — a music-box melody lingering in the air
a mortal has stumbled in mid-revel, the dancers frozen mid-step
the ring is cursed — step inside and you age or youthen a year per second
the great tree is dying and the whole glade's color is bleeding toward winter

lighting_notes.ambient_intent: dappled and slightly magical (0.5-0.6) with green-gold tint

anti_patterns: no straight edges — walls are tree-lines, not masonry
never place fire sources (braziers, torches) — fey light is biological/magical
don't overpack props; negative space full of grass and flower-fill IS the room
mushroom rings should never touch a wall — they need space to feel sacred
